description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows (Qt 5, x86) that runs on push and pull request events. Use a windows-latest job to check out the repository, cache and install Qt 5.15.2 for win32_msvc2019, configure CMake with Visual Studio 17 2022, build and test the project, package it with windeployqt, copy OpenSSL DLLs, and upload the resulting artifact.
